title: Chargeback Lifecycle Tracker
synthetic_data_notice: All entities and records in this package are synthetic mock data for the Chargeback Lifecycle Tracker PoC.

entities.name: ChargebackCase
entities.description: Synthetic payment dispute case used for chargeback lifecycle analytics.

fields.name: id
fields.definition: Synthetic unique chargeback case identifier.

fields.name: order_id
fields.definition: Synthetic order identifier associated with the dispute.

fields.name: merchant_name
fields.definition: Synthetic merchant display name.

fields.name: amount
fields.definition: Disputed transaction amount in the provided currency.

fields.name: currency
fields.definition: ISO-style transaction currency code.

fields.name: dispute_date
fields.definition: Synthetic ISO 8601 timestamp when the dispute was opened.

fields.name: case_status
fields.definition: Current lifecycle state of the synthetic case.

fields.name: dispute_reason
fields.definition: Primary network-style reason category for the synthetic dispute.

fields.name: card_network
fields.definition: Synthetic payment network.

fields.name: loss_allocation
fields.definition: Percentage of disputed amount allocated to merchant liability.

fields.name: merchant_response_evidence
fields.definition: Evidence artifacts submitted by the merchant. Empty arrays indicate no evidence submitted.

fields.name: root_cause_tags
fields.definition: Synthetic operational tags explaining likely dispute drivers.

fields.name: merchant_win_rate
fields.definition: Synthetic case-level outcome confidence or win indicator for resolved disputes.

fields.name: expected_resolution_date
fields.definition: Synthetic expected resolution timestamp for unresolved disputes.

fields.name: synthetic_record_label
fields.definition: Required label making clear that every row is synthetic.

fields.name: edge_case_notes
fields.definition: Notes for unusual or error-state coverage represented by the record.

entities.name: TimelineEvent
entities.description: Synthetic lifecycle event derived by the API from a chargeback case status.

fields.name: case_id
fields.definition: Synthetic chargeback case identifier that owns the timeline event.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.definition: Synthetic ISO 8601 timestamp for the event.

fields.name: event_type
fields.definition: Lifecycle event category.

fields.name: description
fields.definition: Synthetic event description.

fields.name: actor
fields.definition: Synthetic party responsible for the event.

fields.name: synthetic_record_label
fields.definition: Required label making clear that every timeline row is synthetic.
